'''鈭歡-s-f-dh''' ('''kagasfedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electricize|electricize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-f-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electricize|electricize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-s-f-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kagasfedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigasfedhoko|thigasfedhoko]] || [[word:jigasfedhoko|jigasfedhoko]] || [[word:shigasfedhoko|shigasfedhoko]] || [[word:kigasfedhoko|kigasfedhoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
